source.title: Human posterior parietal cortex: effective connectome, and its relation to function

confidence_rationale: HCP 7T data, n=171 participants. Effective connectivity across 21 PPC regions and 360 cortical areas via diffusion tractography. Confirms SLF I/II/III as white matter highway for premotor→PPC efference copy pathway. Intraparietal areas (VIP, LIP, MIP, AIP) connecting to frontal eye fields and premotor areas. Provides anatomical grounding for the efference-copy-to-parietal route required by MECH-098.
